title: Build mixed reality digital twins with Azure Digital Twins and Unity
summary: Learn how to create a mixed reality application using Azure Digital Twins and Unity, a real-time 3D platform.

sections.title: Build mixed reality digital twins with Azure Digital Twins and Unity
sections.summary: Learn how to create a mixed reality application using Azure Digital Twins and Unity, a real-time 3D platform.

lessons.title: Set up a mixed reality project for Azure Digital Twins in Unity
lessons.content_md:
Get step-by-step guidance on how to set up and configure a mixed reality project in Unity. Learn about the Azure Digital Twins and SignalR services and common use cases for the Azure platform in Mixed Reality.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/set-up-mixed-reality-azure-digital-twins-unity/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Set up a mixed reality project for Azure Digital Twins in Unity

lessons.title: Build a 3D Scene for mixed reality in Unity
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create a 3D Scene in Unity using the Microsoft Maps SDK or static terrain. Get familiar with mixed reality scene design, the Unity interface, and deploying your Unity project to a mixed reality device.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/build-3d-scene-mixed-reality-unity/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build a 3D Scene for mixed reality in Unity

lessons.title: Configure 3D assets for mixed reality in Unity
lessons.content_md:
Get step-by-step instructions on how to place Prefab 3D assets and models into a Unity scene. Learn about Unity Scriptable Objects and mixed reality design considerations before deploying to a HoloLens 2.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-3d-assets-mixed-reality-unity/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure 3D assets for mixed reality in Unity

lessons.title: Connect IoT data to mixed reality with Azure Digital Twins and Unity
lessons.content_md:
Stream simulated operational telemetry data from physical assets to Azure Digital Twins and visualize data in Unity and mixed reality. Learn how to use an ARM template, create a user interface in Unity, and identify performance events before deploying to a HoloLens 2.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/connect-iot-hololens-azure-digital-twins-unity/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Connect IoT data to mixed reality with Azure Digital Twins and Unity

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Build mixed reality digital twins with Azure Digital Twins and Unity
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Build mixed reality digital twins with Azure Digital Twins and Unity**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
